title: Fitness-style ranking for primary comparison (WorldQuant Alphathon score)
source: 2026-05-26 review of competition-winner techniques (WorldQuant BRAIN Alphathon scoring: `sqrt(|Returns|/max(turnover, 0.125)) * Sharpe`).
why: As a secondary diagnostic for the human-in-the-loop primary promotion decision — surfaces cases where a quiet alt-data primary (gld_holdings, cot, gdelt_tone) is unfairly outranked by a chatty technical primary with marginal per-trade edge. NOT a replacement for the existing should_stack gate; only a tiebreaker among already-passing primaries.
value_rationale: M (diagnostic only; doesn't change pipeline decisions, only informs human comparison)
scope: extend [pipeline/reporting.py](pipeline/reporting.py) to compute per-fold fitness from existing returns/Sharpe/turnover, aggregate via `np.nanmedian` (mirroring PSR/DSR), emit `summary.json["fitness"]`. Informational only — no auto-selection.
